title: chytraculia zuzygium
side_effects: Chytraculia zuzygium can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity levels when ingested in excess. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Chytraculia zuzygium can cause liver and kidney damage, as well as cardiovascular problems, such as hypertension and arrhythmia. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
